attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
NPOL.PURCHASE_ORDER_LINE_KEY AS PURCHASE_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
ST.ATTRIBUTE9 AS EDCS_NUM,
COALESCE(NP.ITEM_KEY,-997) AS PRODUCT_KEY,
ST.ATTRIBUTE5 AS PROGRAM_TYPE_CD,
ST.ATTRIBUTE1 AS MINIMUM_ORDER_QTY,
/*Shganji:Modified as a part of Q1FY17*/
ST.VENDOR_PRODUCT_NUM AS MNFCTR_PART_NUM,
ST.ATTRIBUTE4 AS PACKAGING_TYPE_CD,
NCIO.INVENTORY_ORGN_NAME_KEY AS CM_INV_ORG_KEY,
NPO.DD_AP_VENDOR_PARTY_KEY  AS VENDOR_PRTY_KEY,
ST.ATTRIBUTE3 AS MANUFACTURER_NAME,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DTM,
USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER,
ST.ACTION_CODE,
CASE WHEN NPOLBE.PURCHASE_ORDER_LINE_KEY IS NULL THEN 'I' ELSE 'U' END AS DML_TYPE,
/*Shganji:Added as a part of December QWIN*/
COALESCE(NPF.BK_BUSINESS_UNIT_ID, 'UNKNOWN') AS  BUY_SELL_BU_ID  ,
ST.ATTRIBUTE6 AS SRC_RPTD_BUY_SELL_BU_ID,
COALESCE(NPF.BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID,'UNKNOWN') AS BUY_SELL_PRDT_FMLY_ID  ,
ST.ATTRIBUTE7 AS SRC_RPTD_BUY_SELL_PRDT_FMLY_ID
FROM
(
SELECT
PO_LINE_ID,
COALESCE(CAST(ATTRIBUTE1 AS DECIMAL(26,7)),0) AS ATTRIBUTE1,
COALESCE(ATTRIBUTE4,'UNKNOWN') AS ATTRIBUTE4,
/*Shganji:Modified as a part of Q1FY17*/
COALESCE(VENDOR_PRODUCT_NUM,'UNKNOWN') AS VENDOR_PRODUCT_NUM,
COALESCE(ATTRIBUTE3,'UNKNOWN') AS ATTRIBUTE3,
COALESCE(ITEM_ID,-997) AS ITEM_ID,
/*shganji:Modified default value from 'UNKNOWN' to ' -' */
COALESCE(ATTRIBUTE8,'  -') AS ATTRIBUTE8,/*Remove CAST*/
COALESCE(ATTRIBUTE5,'UNKNOWN') AS ATTRIBUTE5,
COALESCE(ATTRIBUTE9,'UNKNOWN') AS ATTRIBUTE9,
ACTION_CODE,
/*Shganji:Added as a part of December QWIN*/
COALESCE(ATTRIBUTE6,'UNKNOWN') AS ATTRIBUTE6,
COALESCE(ATTRIBUTE7,'UNKNOWN') AS ATTRIBUTE7
FROM $$STGDB.ST_CG1_PO_LINES_ALL
WHERE ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY ='SHUB Attributes'
UNION ALL
SELECT 
PO_LINE_ID,
COALESCE(CAST(ATTRIBUTE1 AS DECIMAL(26,7)),0) AS ATTRIBUTE1,
COALESCE(ATTRIBUTE4,'UNKNOWN') AS ATTRIBUTE4,
/*Shganji:Modified as a part of Q1FY17*/
COALESCE(VENDOR_PRODUCT_NUM,'UNKNOWN') AS VENDOR_PRODUCT_NUM,
COALESCE(ATTRIBUTE3,'UNKNOWN') AS ATTRIBUTE3,
COALESCE(ITEM_ID,-997) AS ITEM_ID,
/*shganji:Modified default value from 'UNKNOWN' to ' -' */
COALESCE(ATTRIBUTE8,'  -') AS ATTRIBUTE8,/*Remove CAST*/
COALESCE(ATTRIBUTE5,'UNKNOWN') AS ATTRIBUTE5,
COALESCE(ATTRIBUTE9,'UNKNOWN') AS ATTRIBUTE9,
ACTION_CODE,
/*Shganji:Added as a part of December QWIN*/
COALESCE(ATTRIBUTE6,'UNKNOWN') AS ATTRIBUTE6,
COALESCE(ATTRIBUTE7,'UNKNOWN') AS ATTRIBUTE7

FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_PURCHASE_ORD_LN_SUBINV_EXT
WHERE EXCEPTION_TYPE='RI'
) ST
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_PURCHASE_ORDER_LINE NPOL
ON NPOL.SK_PO_LINE_ID_INT = ST.PO_LINE_ID
AND NPOL.SS_CD = 'CG'
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_PURCHASE_ORDER NPO
ON NPO.PURCHASE_ORDER_KEY = NPOL.PURCHASE_ORDER_KEY
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP
ON NP.SK_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID_INT = ST.ITEM_ID
/*shganji:Modified inner join to left join*/
LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_INVENTORY_ORG NCIO
ON NCIO.INVENTORY_ORGANIZATION_CODE = ST.ATTRIBUTE8 /*Wrong logic, attribute id has oraganization code not Organization id  */
/*Shganji:Added as a part of December QWIN*/
LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT_FAMILY NPF
ON NPF.BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID = ST.ATTRIBUTE7
LEFT JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_PURCHASE_ORDER_LN_SUBINV_EXT NPOLBE
ON NPOLBE.PURCHASE_ORDER_LINE_KEY = NPOL.PURCHASE_ORDER_LINE_KEY

SELECT
PO_LINE_ID,
LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
LAST_UPDATED_BY,
PO_HEADER_ID,
LINE_TYPE_ID,
LINE_NUM,
ORDER_TYPE_LOOKUP_CODE,
LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN,
CREATION_DATE,
CREATED_BY,
ITEM_ID,
ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY,
ATTRIBUTE1,
ATTRIBUTE2,
ATTRIBUTE3,
ATTRIBUTE4,
ATTRIBUTE5,
ATTRIBUTE6,
ATTRIBUTE7,
ATTRIBUTE8,
ATTRIBUTE9,
ATTRIBUTE10,
ATTRIBUTE11,
ATTRIBUTE12,
ATTRIBUTE13,
ATTRIBUTE14,
ATTRIBUTE15,
GES_UPDATE_DATE,
GLOBAL_NAME,
BATCH_ID,
CREATE_DATETIME,
ACTION_CODE,
/*Shganji:Added as a part of Q1FY17*/
VENDOR_PRODUCT_NUM,
'RI' AS EXCEPTION_TYPE
FROM $$STGDB.ST_CG1_PO_LINES_ALL ST
LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_INVENTORY_ORG NCIO
ON NCIO.INVENTORY_ORGANIZATION_CODE = ST.ATTRIBUTE8 /*Wrong logic, attribute id has oraganization code not Organization id  */
/*Shganji:Added as a part of December QWIN*/
LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT_FAMILY NPF
ON NPF.BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID = ST.ATTRIBUTE7
WHERE ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY ='SHUB Attributes'
AND NOT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM (SELECT NPOL.SK_PO_LINE_ID_INT FROM $$WORKDB.W_PURCHASE_ORDER_LN_SUBINV_EXT WK, $$FINLGLVWDB.N_PURCHASE_ORDER_LINE NPOL
WHERE NPOL.PURCHASE_ORDER_LINE_KEY = WK.PURCHASE_ORDER_LINE_KEY
AND NPOL.SS_CD = 'CG' AND WK.BUY_SELL_PRDT_FMLY_ID <>'UNKNOWN') INN
WHERE INN.SK_PO_LINE_ID_INT = ST.PO_LINE_ID)
